name: data-warehouse-analytics-cohort-analysis-engine
description: T176 CohortAnalysisEngine — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. Cohort definitions are tenant-scoped. Cross-flow data joins must include tenantId predicate. Emits CohortAnalysisGenerated.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: tenant-scoped cohort definitions, tenantId in every cross-flow join predicate, CohortAnalysisGenerated emission, no cross-tenant data
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + cohort-analysis + cross-flow-join + tenant-predicate + cohort-definition patterns for T176

Break T176 into: consume queue event → load cohort definition (tenant-scoped) → execute cross-flow data joins with tenantId in ALL predicates → compute cohort metrics → storeDocument(cohortAnalysis) → emit CohortAnalysisGenerated

Generate cohort-analysis-engine.service.ts — queue consumer, loads cohort definitions from DATABASE (tenant-scoped from ALS). ALL cross-flow data joins MUST include tenantId predicate — missing tenantId in any join is a security violation. Computes cohort metrics (size, conversion, retention). DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE emitting CohortAnalysisGenerated.
Named check validation: cohort_definitions_tenant_scoped, tenant_id_in_all_join_predicates, cohort_analysis_generated_emitted, store_before_emit, no_cross_tenant_join
Score generated code 0-100 against T176 iron rules: tenant scoped cohorts, tenantId in every join, DNA-8, CohortAnalysisGenerated event
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=tenant-scoped-cohort+tenant-id-in-all-joins+store-before-emit, rejected=join-without-tenant-predicate OR cross-tenant-cohort-data OR emit-before-store. curriculumTier=1.
